## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Content fix (typo, clarity, correctness)
- [ ] New or updated example / lab / script
- [ ] New training module
- [ ] Tooling, CI, or repository maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] No real secrets, endpoints, or organization-specific references were added
- [ ] Relative links and documented commands were verified
- [ ] `make validate` passes locally
- [ ] For modules with a `Makefile`: `make validate` (and `make test` where present) passes
- [ ] The root catalog in `README.md` was updated if a module was added or renamed
